problem id: 942ddd73
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(1) OR SHR(6)) AND ROT(4)

examples:
  10101101 -> 01011010
  00000101 -> 00000000
  00001000 -> 00000000
  11100101 -> 01001010
  00000110 -> 00000000
  11101111 -> 11011110
  00000111 -> 00000000
  11101101 -> 11011010
  10100110 -> 01001010

query: 11110001
predicted answer: 00000011
